review_text: App crashes whenever I try to export my tasks to PDF on my Pixel 7 running Android 14.
Would love to see a calendar view so I can plan my week at a glance.
Amazing app! Syncs perfectly across my devices.
Login keeps failing after the latest update. I get an OAuth timeout error.
Please add tags to tasks. It would really help organize work vs personal items.
Data sync not working between my iPhone and Mac. Tasks disappear randomly.
Love the new focus timer! Helps me stay productive.
Too expensive for what it does compared to other apps.
